coverage.title: Lost & Found Info Book
coverage.subtitle: Phone numbers, hours, and policies for the places that handle lost items in Korea.
coverage.ctaTitle: Lost something? Let us handle it.
coverage.ctaBody: Working through Korean lost & found systems is what we do. Submit a free report and our team takes it from there.

hero.description: Travelers lose thousands of items every day across Seoul, Busan, and Jeju. Our local team navigates the language barrier and recovery process for you.
hero.payTag: Pay only when we find it

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step01Body: Fill out a quick 30-second form with what you lost and where. It's free.
howItWorks.step02Body: Our team contacts Lost112, police stations, subway operators, bus companies, and taxi services — all in Korean so you don't have to.
howItWorks.step03Body: We email you as soon as your item is located, usually within 24-48 hours.
howItWorks.step04Body: Pay ${amount} to get the exact location, contact info, and English pickup instructions. Need delivery? We handle that too.

testimonials.title: Trusted by travelers
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from people who got their belongings back.
testimonials.sarahQuote: I left my passport at a restaurant in Myeongdong. They found it within 6 hours. Lifesaver!
testimonials.kenjiQuote: Lost my wallet on the KTX to Busan. I was already back in Japan when they located it and shipped it to me.
testimonials.emmaQuote: My phone fell out on the subway. I had no idea how to use Lost112 in Korean. They handled everything.
testimonials.lucasQuote: Found my camera bag that I left at Incheon Airport in under 24 hours. Worth every dollar.

aboutUs.title: Who we are
aboutUs.body: We're a Seoul-based team of bilingual Koreans who help foreigners navigate Korea's lost and found system. We speak fluent Korean and English, and we know exactly how to work with Lost112, police stations, transit authorities, and taxi companies. Since Korea's lost item recovery system is almost entirely in Korean, most foreigners give up before even trying. That's where we come in.

pricing.title: Simple, fair pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. You only pay when we actually find your item.
pricing.recoveryPriceSubtext: → ${amount} only when we find your item
pricing.recoveryPriceNote: Free to start. No card needed.
pricing.shippingNoteBold: Shipping costs are calculated after we locate and assess your item.
pricing.shippingNoteBody: We'll send you an exact quote before any shipment — no surprises. Customs duties and import taxes are the recipient's responsibility. All prices in USD.
pricing.paymentMethodsTitle: We accept PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, and Apple Pay

bottomCTA.title: Ready to get your item back?
bottomCTA.body: Submit a report in about 2 minutes. We'll reach out within 24 hours.

whatsapp.bannerCta: Chat with us now for urgent help.

form.step1Subtitle: Tell us how to reach you and what you lost.
form.step2Subtitle: The last place you remember having it.
form.planAllInOneTagline: FREE to start, ${amount} when found (includes pickup & delivery)
form.name: Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What it looks like, what's inside, model number, etc.
form.distinguishingFeaturesPlaceholder: Any unique marks, stickers, engravings, or contents that would help identify it
form.specificLocationPlaceholder: e.g. Line 2, Hongik Univ Station, exit 9
form.dateConfidence: How sure are you about this date?
form.additionalInfoPlaceholder: Anything else — were you with someone? Did you contact any staff?
form.submitFailedGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again.
form.tooManySubmissions: Too many submissions from this network. Please try again later.
form.submittedNotifyPrefix: Our team will search for your item and notify you
form.submittedUnlockPrefix: If we find it, you can unlock the full details for just
form.submittedSaveHint: Save this number to track your case.

checkout.completeToEnable: Complete the form above to enable payment.
checkout.paymentUnavailable: Payment is temporarily unavailable. Please contact us on WhatsApp.

pay.loadErrorHint: The case may have been removed or the link is incorrect.
pay.notFoundBody: We couldn't find a case with that reference.
pay.stillSearchingBody: We haven't located your item yet. You'll get an email the moment we do — no need to check back.
pay.closedBody: We searched but weren't able to find your item. As promised, no charge was made.
pay.foundBodyAllInOne: Pay ${amount} to unlock the recovery details and have your item picked up and shipped to your address.
pay.foundBodyAllInOneNote: Pickup & delivery included. If this turns out not to be your item, we refund in full.
pay.foundBodyRecovery: Pay ${amount} to unlock the exact recovery location, contact info, and step-by-step English pickup instructions.
pay.foundBodyRecoveryNote: If this turns out not to be your item, we refund in full.
pay.foundPhotosHint: Photos taken by our team at the recovery location. Is this your item?
pay.paypalUnavailable: Payment is temporarily unavailable. Please contact us on WhatsApp.
pay.paidBody: Here's everything you need to pick up your item.
pay.receiptEmailed: A receipt has been sent to your email.
pay.authorizationBody: We'll show this to the venue when we collect your item. Required for pickup on your behalf.
pay.authorizationSubmitted: Authorization submitted — our team will handle pickup.
pay.pickupUpgradeBodyMore: more. We'll collect the item on your behalf and ship it straight to you.
pay.pickupUpgradeHintPrefix: Charged only if you agree — no impact on your
pay.pickupUpgradePaid: Pickup add-on paid — our team will handle collection and shipping.
pay.shipmentNoUpdates: No tracking info yet. We'll email as soon as the item ships.
